/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/benchmark_160.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/benchmark_160.dir/src/benchmark_160.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_160.dir/src/ckks_context_160.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_160.dir/src/he_inference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_160.dir/src/rotation_hoisting.cpp.o -o benchmark_160  /usr/local/lib/libseal-4.1.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/14/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
